description_long: This kiosk features a three-panel, angular enclosure with a panoramic cityscape mural on the interior walls, depicting futuristic skyscrapers and a blue sky. The panels are tall and form a partial wraparound, creating a semi-private space. Inside, there is a compact, modular counter or desk area, likely for customer interaction or service. The exterior of the kiosk is plain and white, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a minimalist, modern aesthetic. The roof is flat and continuous with the wall panels, with no overhangs or decorative elements. The overall design suggests a temporary or modular installation suitable for exhibitions, events, or urban pop-up scenarios.
description: A modern, angular kiosk with three tall white panels enclosing a cityscape mural and a small interior counter, designed for urban or event use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open, angular enclosure with cityscape mural and interior counter visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain white exterior and partial glimpse of the mural inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned white panels with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain exterior and a hint of the mural within.
attribute_signage_type: printed mural on interior panels, panoramic cityscape imagery, no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, continuous with wall panels, no overhangs or decorative features, likely same material as walls
